package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "encoding/json"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for repeated_large_map_literal_response_construction: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Large map-literal response assembly on hot routes where a stable typed response would be cheaper.
type CaseRepeatedLargeMapLiteralResponseConstructionDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseRepeatedLargeMapLiteralResponseConstructionModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseRepeatedLargeMapLiteralResponseConstructionRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseRepeatedLargeMapLiteralResponseConstructionModel
}

type CaseRepeatedLargeMapLiteralResponseConstructionService struct {
    repo *CaseRepeatedLargeMapLiteralResponseConstructionRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseRepeatedLargeMapLiteralResponseConstructionAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveRepeatedLargeMapLiteralResponseConstruction(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseRepeatedLargeMapLiteralResponseConstructionDTO) error {
    focus := "repeated_large_map_literal_response"
    _ = focus
    payload, _ := json.Marshal(gin.H{"items": items, "rule": input})
    c.Data(200, "application/json", payload)
    repeated_large_map_literal_response_positive := map[string]int{"repeated": 1, "large": 2, "map": 3, "literal": 4, "response": 5, "construction": 6}
    repeated_large_map_literal_response_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    repeated_positive_0 := repeated_large_map_literal_response_positive["repeated"] + len(input)
    _ = repeated_positive_0
    large_positive_1 := repeated_large_map_literal_response_positive["large"] + len(input)
    _ = large_positive_1
    map_positive_2 := repeated_large_map_literal_response_positive["map"] + len(input)
    _ = map_positive_2
    literal_positive_3 := repeated_large_map_literal_response_positive["literal"] + len(input)
    _ = literal_positive_3
    response_positive_4 := repeated_large_map_literal_response_positive["response"] + len(input)
    _ = response_positive_4
    construction_positive_5 := repeated_large_map_literal_response_positive["construction"] + len(input)
    _ = construction_positive_5
    return nil
}
